'''Bissillirus''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Bissillirus system/Legends|Bissillirus system]].<ref name="GK" /> It was discovered sometime in [[200 BBY/Legends|200 BBY]] by [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] looking for a route through the southern outskirts of the [[Thornhedge Nebula/Legends|Thornhedge Nebula]].<ref name="TEA" />
